summary: Tournament management app where admin creates tournaments visible to all players, and slot counts update in real-time as players register. Active tournament section removed.
architectural_notes: Real-time sync required: tournament visibility and slot counts must update live for all connected players

existing_features.title: Remove the 'Active Tournaments' section from the HomePage (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx). This section currently polls localStorage and displays up to 3 active tournaments. Eliminate it entirely so the homepage no longer shows any tournament listing or related polling logic.

Ensure that when an admin creates a tournament via the AdminPanelPage (frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx), the new tournament is immediately visible to all players on the TournamentsPage (frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx). Use a combination of localStorage storage events and polling (every 3 seconds) to propagate changes across browser tabs/sessions so players see newly created tournaments without a manual page refresh.

Ensure that when a player registers for a tournament (via frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx, which calls incrementTournamentSlots), all other players viewing the TournamentsPage and TournamentCard see the slot count increment by +1 in near real-time. The TournamentsPage and any tournament listing must reflect the updated slot count within the next polling cycle (≤3 seconds) using localStorage events and polling.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove 'active tournament' section from the UI
When admin creates a tournament, all players can see it immediately
When a player registers for a tournament, all players see the slot count increase by 1 in real-time
